key_risks: Hawkish FOMC surprise on June 17 spikes yields and hits growth/semis
Sticky headline CPI (4.2% YoY) triggers risk-off and multiple compression
Semiconductor cycle pullback after large run, profit-taking in SMH
Healthcare policy headlines or weak biotech sentiment drag XLV

portfolio.rationale: Strong momentum, AI capex tailwind, leading semis cycle continues.
Defensive cyclical with strong momentum, geopolitical tailwinds, low drawdown risk.
Defensive sector with positive 30d momentum amid sticky inflation and softening sentiment.
Broadening rally beneficiary; less mega-cap concentration risk into FOMC.
Yield buffer ~3.6% annualized with zero duration risk into hot CPI/FOMC.

portfolio_rationale: Tilt toward sectors with positive momentum and earnings tailwinds (semis, defense, healthcare) while diversifying with equal-weight S&P and a cash-like buffer ahead of the June FOMC and sticky inflation prints.
rationale_summary: Balance AI/semi momentum and defensive cyclicals against macro risks from rising headline CPI, 4.55% 10Y yields, and FOMC uncertainty.
